---
output: html_document
---
I am reading two books: [An Elegant Defense](https://www.goodreads.com/en/book/show/41806641-an-elegant-defense) by Matt Richtel and [The Overstory ](https://www.goodreads.com/en/book/show/40180098-the-overstory) by Richard Powers
<br>
<br>
<img src="images/eleg.jpeg">
<img src="images/over.jpeg">
